message:
chore(release): bump version to 1.2.1

Patch release including:

Security & Validation:
- security(validation): reject newline-separated commands (032c4ee)
- fix(validation): pre-escape newlines for valid JSON output (5d33c7b)

Bug Fixes:
- fix(self-update): expand temp_dir immediately in EXIT trap (9640be4)
- fix(orchestration): mark repo as error when driver load fails (a5f062b)
- fix(orchestration): skip missing worktrees and add velocity division guard (7aee933)
- fix(orchestration): properly pass output to detect_wait_reason (18584ec)
- fix(orchestration): count questions only once per session (95dcc22)
- fix(monitor): pass empty repo_items to start_next_queued_session (69587c4)
- fix(monitor): fix start_next_queued_session signature in monitor_sessions (1f11652)
- fix(governor): pass active session count to can_start_new_session (ad0d8e7)
- fix(quality): add macOS timeout command compatibility (39beb8d)
- fix(review): correct session state tracking in orchestration loop (bd7c832)
- fix(review): improve worktree branch pin handling and test fixes (7109a6d)
- fix(worktree): replace heredoc with printf for test compatibility (2b700d4)
- fix(checkpoint): portable date comparison in is_recently_reviewed (3697b03)

Features & Enhancements:
- feat(session): add unified session log discovery and multi-day rate limit scanning (ffa3c84)
- feat(review): enhance start_next_queued_session with work items support (832da3b)
- feat(orchestration): implement session queue management (14d2f1e)
- feat(session): add output variable support to apply_state_hysteresis (5dfe0d5)
- feat(review): update review prompt to full verbatim policy (94cc1b7)

Testing:
- test(orchestration): add comprehensive test suites for review orchestration
- test(completion): add unit and E2E tests for completion phase
- test(apply): add E2E tests for apply phase
- test(session-monitor): complete session monitor tests
- test(checkpoint): add unit and e2e tests for checkpoint/resume
- test(session-driver): add e2e tests for session driver

Refactoring:
- refactor(orchestration): remove unused repo_index increment (600dc88)
- refactor(session): use proper state file for session-repo mapping (5cba804)
- refactor(git): add repo_is_dirty functions and fix E2E_LOG_DIR export (459fba7)
- refactor(test): support both ntm robot flag formats in mock (eaa7e50)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,7 +120,7 @@ fi
 #==============================================================================
 
 # Version: read from VERSION file, fallback to embedded
-VERSION="1.2.0"
+VERSION="1.2.1"
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/VERSION" ]]; then
     VERSION="$(cat "$SCRIPT_DIR/VERSION")"
